page.headline: Welcome to your engagement.
page.supportingCopy: Your SafeStart engagement begins with a one-hour kickoff Zoom tomorrow at 10:00 AM Central with Joshua Shepherd. Below is what to expect over the next two weeks. Your dashboard will become more active after kickoff — for now, this page is your engagement summary.

headings.text: A few things to bring to the kickoff.
